{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044055C70C4AE46847536C2493"}"},"total":2091},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7540964591847490329","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是真的很日常的甜，番茄其他校园恋爱不是拯救世界就是那种做出很多贡献，这本重生文并没有说无脑挣钱打造商业帝国，反而这种有血有肉的一个个普通高中生构成的青春，而且双向奔赴又无刀真的贼好看，我本来训练完累死了硬是通宵看了2000页，反正作者加油吧，也不是说催更什么的，每一章都很有特点，一些话很触动我。只不过肉是有的吃的但还不够18岁以后能不能全补上[飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":86,"s":82,"text":"双向奔赴","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774125655536C2493%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227540964591847490329%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227509132561315023897%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8F%8C%E5%90%91%E5%A5%94%E8%B5%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755772753,"group_id":"7509132561315023897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1zfDUmM/lH4T+nH8+nJrjy7LRNHvh0yzNNCFDaoSk9O","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ef9142bca4f940bdb5b514a533f91e16~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701734&x-signature=1quATDaAeSVPMunjQBBs3VKn0RQ%3D","user_id":"3974067747565770","user_name":"君崻"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3974067747565770","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7509132561315023897","book_info":{"abstract":"【日常轻松】+【单女主】+【恋爱】+【甜文】+【校花】
“你不能跟她表白。”
“凭什么？”
“因为她，是我女朋友。”
--------------------------
科技精英，别人家孩子三合一典范——周屿。
从小就是标准好学生好孩子，听老师的话，听父母的话，乖乖读书，不早恋。
他是卷王中的卷王，一路卷到博士毕业，创业年入千万，女友还是顶流大明星。
按部就班的满分人生。
周屿认为，自己的青春是没有遗憾的。
然而，下一秒。
他重生了！
重生到高三开学的第一周。
进度条重置到人生为数不多的低谷，自己还刚从重点班掉出来。
最重要的是，彼时的大明星女友，还是一句话都没说过的清冷校花。
“所有副本重刷是吧？”
“好吧，还是有点小遗憾的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/8abd04c975836e0aa60f51489f783292","author":"波函数坍缩","author_id":"","book_id":"7509132561315023897","book_name":"从不早恋的我，重生后开学就表白","book_short_name":"月照孤岛","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0a8b8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"23.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":82,"name":"学霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=82&name=学霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7509132772003283481","read_count":"234939","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1812363"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"692","tags":"都市日常,都市,重生,校花,单女主,搞笑轻松,学霸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fcaf5e7dac7fa4377179cb6d00de5fd2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309655&x-signature=OqqYTBQWOOqEwJqHxwvqYjnVCEg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1354225374724135","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"86"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044055C70C4AE46847536C2493"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21607,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":41842},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1755777452,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557496446028186430","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"先说结论，这可以说是番茄里面最好的几本校园恋爱的文章了，优点很明显，作者文笔不错，加上对尺度的拿捏也很得当，并且写出的爱情也基本符合大众的想象，可以说是很值得推荐的一本书，再说说一点点不足吧（个人看法），首先是男女主的称呼方面，在确认关系之后，他们有时候还会用全称来称呼对方，这个我个人觉得在细节上是有点欠缺的，当然，我们是站在第三视角去看待这个故事，这也无伤大雅，不过，希望作者以后描述的时候能在称呼方面注意一点，最好是有情侣之间的爱称，其次是一些人物的塑造太刻意了，比如说作者在网吧发现的那个末来明星，讲真我不知道这个角色有什么用，因为写到一半作者就没有交代了，不同于主角哥们的出行，这个角色身上的故事，其实是没有完结的，如果是群像文的话，塑造太单薄，如果是恋爱文的话，角色太多余。当然，这本书总的来说还是瑕不掩瑜的，还是很推荐喜欢校园青春或校园爱情的朋友看看这条书","text_exts":[{"e":377,"s":373,"text":"校园爱情","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A1%E5%9B%AD%E7%88%B1%E6%83%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774125655536C2493%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227557496446028186430%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227509132561315023897%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A1%E5%9B%AD%E7%88%B1%E6%83%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759622160,"group_id":"7509132561315023897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"好看的灵魂千篇一律，有趣的皮囊万里挑一。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/2Lolv3C3gP0B2EK3E7JCB+RNPQiuS+GL+KlEm8WRxo","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8c8e0d90241f43fcb95d3f4aa63e91a6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703964&x-signature=rFO8
